next_priority: Close the current MVP stage; treat the remaining three tracks as optional post-MVP work only when explicitly scheduled.

optional_post_mvp_tasks.rationale: Infrastructure for KB, patch, reports, and evidence is mature; future work should add more reviewed content only when a specific content pack is selected.
Official API behavior is covered by fake gateway and contract tests; live GW2 smoke checks depend on external credentials, network, and rate limits.
Player UI smoke and completion tests cover workflows; browser screenshot polish should run for future layout changes, not as a blocker for current closeout.
